summary: Comprehensive testing completed for JobSwipe Tinder-like job application platform. Backend APIs achieved 100% success rate (16/16 tests). Frontend workflows including registration, login, job posting, swiping, and navigation all working correctly. Full end-to-end functionality verified for both job seekers and recruiters.
passed_tests: API health check and all 13 backend endpoint test suites
User registration for both seeker and recruiter roles
Job browsing and swiping by seekers (like/pass/superlike)
Navigation between all app pages (dashboard, matches, profile)
Landing page with proper CTAs and navigation
Responsive UI elements with proper data-testid attributes
